joint_control_tests.description: Approved KIRA + ANDREY joint control test outputs.
joint_control_tests.prompt_goal: Use approved duo outputs to verify Kira and Andrey identity stability, scale, interaction and scene compatibility.

neutral_studio_duo.description: Approved neutral studio duo control test.
neutral_studio_duo.prompt_goal: Use for neutral duo scale and identity checks.

evening_embankment_duo.prompt_goal: Use for cinematic evening city duo scenes.

warm_bar_conversation.description: Approved warm bar conversation duo scene.
warm_bar_conversation.prompt_goal: Use for warm indoor bar conversation scenes.

sea_yacht_mood_duo.prompt_goal: Use for sea/yacht duo scenes with sunset lighting.

rules: Do not use rejected/wrong-scene outputs as canon.
Do not overwrite approved joint test files.
Kira barefoot height remains 168 cm even when heels make her appear taller.
Preserve both identities; do not blend faces.
